'''Kerner''' was a member of a group of pirates that had been stealing shipments of high tech supplies from around [[Gadrin]]. The pirates were using a landing platform hidden in [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin's]] jungles west of Gadrin. Kerner was assigned with [[Bont]] to keep people out of the sector near the landing platform. When a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] bearing a group of people looking for [[Darin]] entered the area, the pirates attempted to shoot them down. Kerner was unprepared for the people in the speeder to shoot back, however. When they did so, he lost control of his [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] and crashed.
